name: Sleeping With Death
overview: This compelling edge-of-your-seat docu-series recounts some of the most bizarre and crazy murders in which someone wakes up to a dead body.. With access to lead investigators, key witnesses and those closest to the victim, the series uncovers the secrets and truth behind each twisted murder.

trailers.title: These cases are nightmares turned into reality | Sleeping With Death | Oxygen #shorts #truecrime
